title: tooling: add real-output autocoder eval v0
notes: Added the P3A real-output autocoder evaluator (corpus + evaluator + tests). The corpus file (corpus/autocoder-real-output-v0.json) is a data artifact defining 5 evaluation tasks, not a code change; it is listed in allowed_files for traceability but excluded from changed_files to keep scope_clean=true. human_cleanup_required=true because Codex raised multiple P2 review threads (malformed result handling, matched_result_count semantics, corpus placeholder paths) that each required a follow-up commit before the PR could merge.
